script_en: It's about time you showed up Fox. You're the only hope for our world.
script_pt: Que bom que apareceram\nStar Fox! Voces sao nossa\nunica esperanca.

script_en: I'll do my best! Andross won't have his way with me.
script_pt: Vou sentar o dedo!\nDessa vez o Andross nao\nvai se dar bem!

script_en: This is Peppy. All systems go.
I see em’ up ahead. Let's rock and roll!
Slippy, watch out! Bogey on your tail!
Thanks Fox. I thought they had me.
